news.summary: In New York, Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), the parent company of renowned brands such as Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, released its fiscal third-quarter results ending March 29, 2025. Joanne Crevoiserat, the CEO of Tapestry, Inc., expressed satisfaction with their performance, highlighting a notable increase in both revenue and profit. This positive outcome has led to an upward revision of their fiscal year forecast, underscoring the robustness and appeal of the Tapestry brand portfolio.
news.headline: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) beats Q3 expectations and raises full-year outlook for fiscal 2025, CEO comments on strong performance.

news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp., a prominent foodservice distributor in the US, released its first quarter fiscal year 2025 results. In this period, total case volume grew by 1.1%, with independent restaurant case volume rising by 2.5%. Net sales saw a 4.5% increase, reaching $9.4 billion. The company also noted an 8.0% rise in gross profit, totaling $1.6 billion. Net income surged by 40.2% to $115 million, while adjusted EBITDA saw a significant increase of 9.3% to $389 million during this quarter.
news.headline: US Foods Q1 FY2025: Net sales $9.4B, net income $115M, Adjusted EBITDA $389M, 1.1% case volume increase.

news.summary: Krispy Kreme, Inc. shared their financial report for the quarter ending March 30, 2025. In comparison to Q1 of 2024, the highlights include a net revenue of $375.2 million. Organic revenue saw a slight decrease of 1.0% amounting to $374.7 million. The company reported a GAAP net loss totaling $33.4 million with adjusted EBITDA standing at $24.0 million. Operating activities resulted in GAAP cash usage of $20.8 million. The Global Points of Access (POA) observed a significant increase, rising by 3,168 or 21.4% to reach 17,982.
news.headline: Krispy Kreme reported Q1 2025 results: $375.2M revenue, $33.4M loss, 21.4% POA increase, $20.8M operating cash used.

news.summary: Warby Parker Inc. (NYSE: WRBY), a leading direct-to-consumer lifestyle brand in the vision industry, released its financial report for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company showcased a robust performance with the opening of 11 new stores, surpassing profit projections. Additionally, they achieved remarkable e-commerce growth, the highest since 2021. They also marked their seventh successive quarter of escalating active customer expansion. This success was highlighted by Chief Executive Officer (CEO) C and signifies a strong start to the year 2025.
news.headline: Warby Parker reports Q1 2025 results: 11 net new stores, highest e-commerce growth since 2021, 7th consecutive quarter of active customer growth.

news.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) headquartered in Summit, NJ, has named Amit Banati as their new Chief Financial Officer, starting from May 12, 2025. As the CFO, Banati will lead the Finance and Strategy departments, focusing on driving profitable growth and enhancing shareholder value. This appointment comes after a comprehensive selection process. Banati will be taking over from Paul Ruh, who will stay on briefly to assist with the transition.
news.headline: Kenvue Inc. names Amit Banati as CFO, starting May 12, 2025. He will focus on finance and strategy for growth. Paul Ruh to assist transition.

news.summary: Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE:CIM) disclosed their financial figures for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, today in New York. The company reported a GAAP net income of $1.77 per diluted common share for Q1. Additionally, they revealed that earnings available for distribution stood at $0.41 per diluted common share in the same period. Furthermore, the GAAP book value per common share was noted at $21.17, with an economic return of 9.20% as of March 31, 2025. Chimera expressed satisfaction with their performance during the quarter, particularly highlighting the earnings available for distribution.
news.headline: Chimera reports 1st quarter 2025 earnings: $1.77 net income per share, $0.41 earnings available per share, $21.17 book value per share.

news.summary: Merck Animal Health, a division of Merck & Co., Inc., based in Rahway, N.J., and known as MSD Animal Health internationally, in collaboration with Kansas Governor Laura Kelly, revealed plans for an $895 million expansion of its manufacturing site in De Soto, Kansas. This capital investment will take place on Merck's current property in De Soto, where its biologics facility is located. The expansion project is set to significantly boost the company's operations and capacity.
news.headline: Merck Animal Health and Kansas invested $895 million in De Soto facility expansion for manufacturing & R&D.

news.summary: In New York, International Seaways, Inc. (NYSE: INSW) disclosed its first quarter 2025 outcomes. The company, a major global tanker firm offering energy shipping services for crude oil and petroleum products, reported notable results. The net income recorded for the initial quarter of 2025 stood at $50 million, equivalent to $1.00 per diluted share. Adjusted net income(1), which excludes special items, was also highlighted in the report.
news.headline: International Seaways reported first quarter 2025 net income of $50 million ($1.00 per share), excluding special items.

news.summary: Nomad Foods Limited (NYSE: NOMD) based in Woking, England, reported a significant increase in gross margin thanks to successful expansion efforts. Despite challenges such as retailer destocking and fluctuations in Easter timing, retail sell-out growth was observed. Consequently, the company is adjusting its full-year sales projections, as well as expectations for Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EPS. This update showcases the company's resilience in the face of market variations.
news.headline: Nomad Foods reports Q1 2025 financial results: strong gross margin expansion, retailer destocking & Easter timing affects.

news.summary: A recently conducted study on XULANE LO, a low-dose estrogen treatment, has shown promising results. The treatment successfully met all primary and secondary efficacy and safety measures, indicating a potential best-in-class performance for the patch. Based on these findings, a new drug application is expected to be submitted to the U.S. FDA in the latter half of 2025. The results were announced in Pittsburgh on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Positive Phase 3 results for XULANE LO™ birth control patch; potential best-in-class performance; FDA submission expected 2H 2025.
Brookfield Corp sees distributable earnings rise by 27% to $1.5B.

news.summary: Revenue soared by 18.3% to reach $706.0 million compared to the same period last year, while net income more than doubled to $76.1 million, marking a 205.6% increase. Diluted earnings per share rose to $0.34 for the quarter. Additionally, adjusted net income surged by 188.9% to $88.1 million over the previous year.
news.headline: Life Time's Q1 2025 shows $706.0M revenue (up 18.3%) and $76.1M net income (up 205.6%). Diluted EPS hit $0.34.

news.summary: In New York City, Olaplex Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OLPX) revealed its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, known as OLAPLEX, unveiled these results to the public.
news.headline: Olaplex (NASDAQ: OLPX) announces Q1 2025 financial results, ending March 31.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Consello, a prominent global advisory and investing platform, disclosed its involvement in the establishment of a fresh ownership consortium for English football team Salford City FC (SCFC). The consortium will be spearheaded by David Beckham alongside a partner from Consello.
news.headline: Consello partners with David Beckham to form new ownership group for Salford City FC. Beckham to lead the English soccer club.

news.summary: The annual inflation rate in the US rose to 5.4% in September, reaching its highest level in 13 years. This marked a significant increase from the previous month's rate of 5.3% and surpassed economists' expectations. The surge in inflation was largely driven by rising energy prices, with gasoline and electricity costs soaring by 42% and 5.7%, respectively. Additionally, the cost of food items increased by 4.6% compared to the previous year. The continued supply chain disruptions and labor shortages have also contributed to the inflationary pressures. Economists are closely monitoring these developments to assess their potential long-term impact on the economy and consumer purchasing power.
news.headline: MAG declares its 2nd dividend for shareholders.

news.summary: Today, on May 8, 2025, Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) revealed changes in its executive leadership to boost the company's long-term growth and global reach of its medicines.
news.headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) announces leadership changes to drive long-term growth and reach global population with medicines.
Stantec to design 7km Dundas Bus Rapid Transit in Mississauga East, Ontario.

news.summary: Valvoline Inc. has revealed that Kevin Willis will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) starting on May 19, 2025. The current CFO, Mary Meixelsperger, who had announced her retirement in October 2024, will stay on with the company for a transitional period. The announcement was made in LEXINGTON, Ky.
news.headline: Valvoline Inc. appoints Kevin Willis as CFO effective May 19, 2025. Mary Meixelsperger to transition before retirement.

news.summary: Blue Moon Metals Inc. has announced the mobilization of Leonhard Nilsen & Sønner AS for underground development at its Nussir Copper-Gold-Silver Project in Northern Norway. LNS, a top tunneling and mining contractor, will assist in confirming mining parameters. The work, spanning a year, aims to support engineering studies for a final investment decision in 2026. Blue Moon's stock trades as TSXV: MOON and OTCQX: BMOOF.
news.headline: Blue Moon Metals started mobilization for Nussir Underground Development with a C$1.13M investment and hired LNS as a contractor.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in a joint announcement from West Palm Beach, FL, and Madrid, AMG revealed its plan to acquire a minority equity stake in Qualitas Energy. This move solidifies AMG's position as a key ally to top independent investment management companies worldwide. Qualitas Energy, a prominent global investment and management entity, specializes in financing and advancing renewable energy, energy transition, and sustainable infrastructure projects. The agreement marks a significant step in AMG's strategic growth, underscoring their commitment to sustainable investment practices.
news.headline: AMG partners with Qualitas Energy, acquires minority equity interest in global investment firm focusing on renewable energy.
King Charles leads Britain's VE day celebrations
Trump slams Fed chairman after rate hold decision

news.summary: Beyond Meat Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND) fell short of analyst forecasts in Q1 of the current fiscal year and retracted its full-year revenue guidance due to economic uncertainties. The CEO mentioned a potentially minimal tariff impact on the company. They revised their outlook for the year, focusing solely on Q2 net revenue expectations. CEO Lubi Kutua stated, "We are facing increased uncertainty in our operating environment due to volatile macroeconomic conditions." When asked about tariff implications during the earnings call, Kutua stated, "We have analyzed it, and although there are no guarantees, we believe the direct impact could be minimal." The complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Beyond Meat misses Q1 expectations, withdraws full-year guidance due to economic uncertainties. CEO downplays tariff threat, forecasts minimal impact.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Company Q reported that its revenues were at the high end of the projected range. The gross margin was in line with expectations, and the earnings per share exceeded the provided guidance range. Looking ahead to the second quarter of 2025, the company is expecting a decrease in revenues ranging from 5.0% to an increase of 3.0% quarter over quarter. The gross margin for the upcoming quarter is anticipated to be around 31.0%. Additionally, the profit per diluted American Depositary Share (ADS) is estimated to be between 8.5 cents and 11.5 cents.
news.headline: Himax Technologies reports Q1 2025 revenues at high end of range, EPS exceeded guidance. Q2 2025 revenues expected to decrease 5.0% to increase 3.0%, gross margin around 31.0%, profit per ADS 8.5 to 11.5 cents.

news.summary: Today, Somnigroup International Inc. (NYSE: SGI) based in Lexington, Kentucky, disclosed a cash dividend of $0.15 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is scheduled to be paid on June 5, 2025.
news.headline: Somnigroup declared 2nd quarter cash dividend of $0.15/share, payable June 5, 2025. Board of Directors announced.

news.summary: President Trump is set to reveal a trade agreement between the United States and the United Kingdom. This pact is anticipated to enhance economic relations between the two nations, potentially boosting trade figures. In addition, the President is expected to revoke restrictions on global chip exports, a move that could have a significant impact on international semiconductor trade. The announcement is scheduled to take place on May 8 and has garnered attention from various sources, including Bloomberg.
news.headline: Trump to reveal US-UK trade pact, revoke global chip curbs, as per Bloomberg The Pulse 05/08.

news.summary: In the beginning of 2025, Somnigroup International Inc. reported a remarkable 35% increase in net sales growth for the first quarter. The company also showcased a robust first quarter cash flow from operations amounting to $106 million. These figures signify a strong start to the year for the Company. The financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025 were disclosed, along with revised projections for the upcoming months. Somnigroup International Inc., trading under the symbol NYSE: SGI, presented these encouraging statistics on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Somnigroup International Inc. reports 35% net sales growth in Q1 2025 and $106 million cash flow. NYSE: SGI.

news.summary: Liquidia Corporation, a biopharmaceutical company, awaits FDA action on YUTREPIA NDA with a PDUFA goal date of May 24, 2025. The District Court dismissed a cross claim challenging an amendment to YUTREPIA's NDA. They fully enrolled Cohort A of ASCENT study with over 50 patients with PH-ILD. They accessed up to $100 million in financing from HealthCare Royalty Company. Liquidia reported financial results for Q1 2025, with $169.8 million in cash and $3.1 million in revenue. They aim to commercialize YUTREPIA for PAH and PH-ILD, believing it can be a preferred treatment. Liquidia will present additional data from ASCENT study at an upcoming conference. They also strengthened their financial position through a financing agreement. Liquidia continues to develop YUTREPIA and L606 for PAH and PH-ILD patients.
news.headline: Liquidia Corp reported Q1 2025 results, awaiting FDA on YUTREPIA NDA with PDUFA date May 24. Received up to $100M financing. Financials: Cash $169.8M, Revenue $3.1M, Net loss $38.4M. Developing YUTREPIA and L606 for rare cardiopulmonary diseases.

news.summary: Arhaus, an omni-channel retailer of home furnishings, reported its first quarter 2025 results with net revenue at $311 million, a 5.5% increase from the same period in 2024. Gross margin increased to $116 million, while net income decreased to $5 million. Adjusted EBITDA also decreased to $19 million. The company completed 5 showroom projects in the first quarter and plans to complete 12-15 projects by 2025. As of March 31, 2025, Arhaus had no long-term debt, $214 million in cash equivalents, $301 million in inventory, and $263 million in client deposits. The company updated its full-year 2025 outlook due to tariff-related volatility and softening consumer sentiment. The outlook includes net revenue guidance of $1.29 billion to $1.38 billion and net income guidance of $48 million to $68 million. Arhaus aims to reduce China sourcing to approximately 1% of total receipts by the fourth quarter.
news.headline: Arhaus reported Q1 2025 results: $311M net revenue, $116M gross margin, $110M SG&A expenses, $5M net income. Focus on showroom expansion and reducing China sourcing. Q1 financial highlights and outlook adjustments. Showroom projects, balance sheet, full-year 2025 guidance provided. Conference call on May 8, 8:30 a.m. ET. Company founded in 1986, specializing in premium home furnishings. Provide complementary view of results through non-GAAP financial measures. Note on forward-looking statements and risk factors. Balance sheet highlights with assets totaling $1.26B and liabilities detailed. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Hut 8 Corp, an energy infrastructure platform focusing on Bitcoin mining, reported financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company saw a 79% increase in hashrate due to an ASIC fleet upgrade, leading to a 37% improvement in fleet efficiency. They reported revenue of $21.8 million, a net loss of $134.3 million, and Adjusted EBITDA of ($117.7) million. As of March 31, 2025, they managed 1,020 MW of energy capacity and had a strategic Bitcoin reserve of 10,264 Bitcoin worth $847.2 million. Additionally, they have a 10,800 MW development pipeline, with 2,600 MW under exclusivity. The company is developing a diverse range of projects and continues to focus on growth while maintaining a strong capital position. They also launched American Bitcoin, a majority-owned subsidiary, for industrial-scale Bitcoin mining. Hut 8 is optimistic about its future growth potential and shareholder value creation.
news.headline: Hut 8's Q1 2025 results show increased hashrate, revenue of $21.8M, net loss of $134.3M, and 1,020 MW in energy capacity.

news.summary: HLS Therapeutics Inc. reported a 5% growth in total product revenue compared to Q1 2024, with Canadian product revenue growing by 13%. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 41% (or 78% excluding royalty revenue). The company secured Canadian rights to NEXLETOL and NEXLIZET from Esperion Therapeutics, expanding its cardiovascular portfolio. Revenue for Vascepa increased by 34%, while Clozaril Canada revenue increased by 1% and Clozaril US revenue increased by 3%. Operating expenses decreased by 20%, and cash from operations was $3.5 million. Revenue from product sales in Canada and the US increased, with Vascepa and Clozaril sales showing significant growth. Adjusted EBITDA increased due to growth in marketed products and cost management efforts. Net loss improved to ($4.4) million, and cash from operations was $3.5 million for the quarter. The company also announced the launch of a share buyback program and the appointment of Christine Elliott to the Board of Directors.
news.headline: HLS Therapeutics reports 5% product revenue growth in Q1 2025, with $12.6 million revenue, 41% EBITDA growth to $3.8 million. Expands Cardiovascular portfolio. In Canada, product revenue rose 13%, with Vascepa sales up 34%. Operating expenses down 20%. Royalty revenue decreased 71%. Adjusted EBITDA increased 41%, or 78% excluding royalties. Net loss decreased to ($4.4) million. Cash from operations increased to $3.5 million in Q1 2025. Expansion agreement with Esperion Therapeutics for NEXLETOL& NEXLIZET. Initiates share buyback program, former Minister of Health in Ontario joins Board. Visit Benzinga.com for full details.

news.summary: The company reported total revenue of $706.0 million with Direct-to-Consumer (“DTC”) revenue reaching $179.2 million. This represents an 8.6% increase sequentially and an 8.4% increase year over year. Additionally, DTC platforms revenue saw a 2.6% sequential increase and a 4.5% increase year over year.
news.headline: Playtika reports Q1 2025 revenue of $706M with DTC revenue of $179.2M, up 8.6% sequentially and 8.4% YoY. DTC platforms revenue increased 2.6% sequentially and 4.5% YoY.

news.summary: The Ethereum Pectra upgrade introduced the Ethereum Improvement Proposal (EIP) 7702, facilitating account abstraction accessibility. Wallet providers like Ambire and Trust Wallet have implemented this upgrade, with Ambire's CEO describing it as a significant UX improvement. EIP-7702 enables existing user accounts to temporarily function as smart contracts, allowing advantages of account abstraction without needing new addresses. Trust Wallet also introduced the feature of paying gas fees in tokens instead of Ether, enhancing user experience. Ambire's features include crosschain architecture, gas fee abstraction, decentralized finance aggregator Li.Fi integration, and AI compatibility. Both Ambire and Trust Wallet focus on privacy and self-custody, ensuring users interact directly with the blockchain. However, concerns have been raised regarding potential phishing risks associated with EIP-7702. Trust Wallet additionally offers features like bundled transactions, sponsored transaction support, and automated actions. Overall, these upgrades aim to make wallets more intelligent and user-friendly while enhancing the overall decentralized finance experience.
news.headline: Multiple wallets, like Ambire and Trust Wallet, implement Ethereum EIP-7702 for enhanced UX. New features include paying gas fees in tokens.

news.summary: Costamare Inc., a company publicly traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CMRE, recently disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The report was issued from Monaco on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Costamare Inc. announces Q1 2025 financial results. (NYSE: CMRE)

news.summary: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc., based in Akron, Ohio, has announced that they will be holding a conference call and webcast on Monday, May 12, 2025, at 5 p.m. Eastern Time (ET). This event is scheduled for discussing important company updates and is open to investors and the public.
news.headline: Babcock & Wilcox to hold Q1 2025 conference call and webcast on May 12, 2025 at 5 p.m. ET. #BW

news.summary: In Duluth, Minnesota, ALLETE, Inc. (NYSE: ALE) announced their first quarter earnings for 2025, totaling 97 cents per share with a net income of $56.1 million. This marked an improvement from the first quarter of the previous year, which saw earnings of 88 cents per share and a net income of $50.7 million. The 2025 net income figure includes $2.1 million in after-tax transaction expenses, or 4 cents per share, associated with a merger. In comparison, the first quarter of 2024 had $1.2 million in after-tax transaction expenses, or 2 cents per share. The company expressed satisfaction with the results.
news.headline: ALLETE, Inc. reports Q1 2025 earnings of 97 cents/share on $56.1 million net income, up from 88 cents/share and $50.7 million last year.

news.summary: NCR Voyix Corporation, a top digital commerce solutions provider, announced its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported revenue of $617 million for the quarter, down from $710 million in the same period last year. The net loss from continuing operations attributed to NCR Voyix was $20 million, an improvement from the $71 million net loss in the previous year's quarter. The company's adjusted EBITDA [Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization] was also noteworthy, although the exact figures were not provided in the snippet.
news.headline: NCR Voyix reports $617M revenue, $20M net loss in Q1 2025 compared to $710M revenue, $71M net loss in prior year.

news.summary: Beverage company Molson Coors announced its first quarter results for 2025. The report was released in Golden, Colorado, and Montréal. The specific financial numbers and details of the report were not provided.
news.headline: Molson Coors Beverage Company announces its first quarter 2025 results.

news.summary: In Middleton, Wisconsin, Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPB) disclosed its performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on March 30, 2025. The company, recognized for its consumer products and home essentials globally, emphasized its dedication to innovation and customer service. Despite facing difficulties due to macroeconomic factors and tariffs, Spectrum Brands remains optimistic about its prospects. The quarter's financial results showcased the company's resilience amidst challenges.
news.headline: Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. reports Q2 results for fiscal 2025, ending March 30, 2025, showing challenges due to macroeconomic and tariff pressures.

news.summary: In Casa Grande, Arizona and Toronto, ASCU has announced significant progress in advancing the 2024 Preliminary Economic Assessment to Pre-feasibility Study. Key workstreams have been updated, indicating substantial developments in the project.
news.headline: ASCU updates workstreams at Cactus Project in Arizona, advancing to Pre-feasibility Study for 2024.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST) revealed a significant collaboration with Komatsu to supply lidar sensors for Komatsu’s autonomous mining equipment range. The multimillion-dollar deal solidifies Ouster as the provider of advanced 3D digital lidar technology for Komatsu's construction, mining, forestry, and industrial heavy equipment line. This partnership marks Ouster's continued expansion in the market, showcasing its high-performance solutions on a global scale.
news.headline: Ouster will supply lidar sensors for Komatsu’s autonomous mining equipment, with a multimillion-dollar agreement.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on May 8, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, wrapped up TOKEN2049 Week with its Institutional (INS) Symposium. This exclusive event aimed to strengthen relationships and facilitate discussions among key industry players.
news.headline: Bybit concludes TOKEN2049 Week with Institutional Symposium in Dubai. 2nd largest exchange by trading volume.

news.summary: A well-known funding company has launched a groundbreaking program aimed at providing plaintiffs with support in covering their monthly expenses while awaiting the resolution of their case. The initiative provides a much-needed lifeline for individuals during this period of uncertainty. Legal-Bay, a prominent pre-settlement funding firm, revealed this innovative financial assistance plan in Houston on May 8, 2025. The program is designed to offer vital financial stability to plaintiffs as they navigate the legal process, offering substantial relief by assisting with their bills until their case is settled. This new offering heralds a significant step forward in empowering individuals with the resources they need to cope with the financial challenges that often accompany legal proceedings.
news.headline: Legal-Bay introduces INSTALL Funding to aid plaintiffs awaiting settlements, providing monthly financial relief in Houston.

news.summary: The company experienced significant growth in organic Net Sales, largely attributed to an increase in volume. The Adjusted EBITDA margin has expanded, with an Integration plan progressing as per schedule. There is an opportunity for cost synergies amounting to $300 million, of which $200 million is projected to be realized by 2025, with the rest expected to be achieved by 2026. The company has restated its full-year outlook for 2025.
news.headline: Primo Brands reports strong Q1 2025 results with organic Net Sales growth and expects to capture $200 million cost synergies in 2025.
